title: The Delectable Mountains
subtitle: Clear air, wise counsel, and a distant home
intro: The prison air breaks behind you, and the mountains rise green and clean beneath shepherds who know the road.
They do not flatter pilgrims with easy promises. They give warnings, wounds named honestly, and a glass turned toward home.
Look long at the City. Hope is not fantasy here; it is a sight given before the last heaviness comes.
spiritual_theme: Pastoral counsel, restored hope, and sight fixed on the promised end
core_mechanic: Rest on the mountains, hear the Shepherds' warnings, look through the glass toward the City, and carry that sight into the last trials.
